name: Volcanic Doomfire
name_jp: ヴォルカニック・デビル
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 1 "Tri-Blaze Accelerator" you control to the GY. During your opponent's Battle Phase, all Attack Position monsters your opponent controls that can attack must attack this card. If this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Destroy as many monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each monster destroyed by this effect.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 1 "Tri-Blaze Accelerator" you control to the GY. During your opponent's Battle Phase, all Attack Position monsters your opponent controls that can attack must attack this card. If this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Destroy as many monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each monster destroyed by this effect.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duel Academy Box

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Trigger
action: Sends from field to Graveyard for Special Summon
Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
